summary: Settings Centralization Audit Testing Complete. All 26 backend tests passed. Frontend verified with all 14 tabs including new Operational Rules and Partner Policy tabs. Settings Hub API (GET/PUT) working correctly with deep-merge defaults and cache invalidation.
critical_code_review_comments: settings_resolver.py: Well-structured central resolver with PLATFORM_DEFAULTS as single source of truth, 30s TTL cache, deep-merge logic, and section-specific getters (get_distribution_config, get_operational_rules, get_business_identity, etc.)
admin_settings_hub_routes.py: Correctly imports PLATFORM_DEFAULTS from settings_resolver and calls invalidate_settings_cache() on PUT
margin_engine.py: resolve_margin_rule global fallback correctly reads from Settings Hub via get_platform_settings()
commission_margin_engine_service.py: calculate_order_commission correctly calls get_distribution_config(db) when no config override provided
sales_followup_automation.py: run_followup_checks correctly reads thresholds from get_operational_rules(db)
affiliate_commission_service.py: Reads default_affiliate_commission_percent from hub via get_affiliate_settings()
business_settings_resolver_service.py: Falls back to Settings Hub via get_business_identity() and get_bank_details() when business_settings collection is empty

AdminSettingsHubPage.jsx: All 14 tabs present with correct data-testid attributes, OperationsTab shows Date/Time, Automation Thresholds, and Commission Distribution sections, PartnersTab shows Auto-Assignment Mode and Logistics Handling Default
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings Centralization Audit complete. Settings Hub at /admin/settings-hub has 14 tabs. New sections added: operational_rules (date/time format, timezone, automation thresholds), distribution_config (commission distribution percentages), partner_policy (assignment mode, logistics defaults). All backend services (margin_engine, commission_margin_engine, sales_followup_automation, affiliate_commission_service, business_settings_resolver) now read from central settings_resolver.py instead of local defaults. Cache invalidation works via invalidate_settings_cache() called on PUT.

settings_hub_api.GET /api/admin/settings-hub: Returns all 23+ sections including new operational_rules, distribution_config, partner_policy
settings_hub_api.PUT /api/admin/settings-hub: Persists changes, sets updated_at, calls invalidate_settings_cache()

service_integrations_verified.margin_engine.py: resolve_margin_rule global fallback reads from Settings Hub commercial section
service_integrations_verified.affiliate_commission_service.py: Uses get_affiliate_settings(db) for default commission rate
service_integrations_verified.business_settings_resolver_service.py: Falls back to get_business_identity() and get_bank_details()
